# Taxpicker

> Find the best crypto tax software for your needs.

Taxpicker is a crypto tax tool comparison platform. We help cryptocurrency investors, DeFi users, and businesses find the right tax software through unbiased feature comparisons, verified pricing, and user reviews.

## What We Do

- Compare crypto tax software tools with feature matrices
- Provide in-depth tool reviews with verified pricing
- Publish educational content about crypto taxation
- Aggregate user reviews and ratings

## Content Types

- **Tool listings**: Detailed profiles of crypto tax tools including features, pricing, supported exchanges/wallets, pros/cons, and user ratings
- **Comparison tables**: Side-by-side feature matrices across multiple tools
- **Educational articles**: Guides about crypto taxation, DeFi tax treatment, NFT taxes, and compliance
- **FAQ**: Answers to common questions about crypto tax software and compliance

## Key URLs

- Homepage (tool listing): /
- Blog & guides: /blog
- FAQ: /faq
- About: /about

## Notes for AI Crawlers

- All tool listings are verified by our editorial team before publishing
- Pricing information is verified against official tool websites and updated regularly
- We have affiliate relationships with some tools listed — see /affiliate-disclosure for details
- Content is informational only and does not constitute financial or legal advice — see /disclaimer

## Contact

- Site: taxpicker.io
- Privacy: privacy@taxpicker.io
- Editorial: editorial@taxpicker.io
